plan_summary.primary_goal: Recover 200+ petabytes of at-risk 1950-2000 archival media via 30 mobile ingest units over 10 years
plan_summary.modelling_frame: Tests whether the $250M budget, 30-MIU fleet, AI-plus-human review buffer, uptime target, and pre-treatment reliability gates collectively support the 200 PB recovery mandate.

key_values.label: Total 10-year program budget
key_values.comment: Hard cap on total capital and operating spend across the 10-year deployment; gates fleet sizing and OpEx.
key_values.source_text: Total project budget over ten years is $250 million.

key_values.label: Target operational fleet size
key_values.comment: Maximum simultaneous MIU count; sets aggregate throughput and aggregate annual OpEx denominator.
key_values.source_text: Target fleet size of 30 MIUs operating simultaneously worldwide.

key_values.label: Annual operating cost per MIU
key_values.comment: Mid-point of stated $2-3M range; drives fleet-wide 10-year OpEx and Phase 3 viability.
key_values.source_text: Annual operating cost per MIU is $2-3 million.

key_values.label: Minimum equipment uptime threshold
key_values.comment: Fleet must stay above this availability or the maintenance program is deemed unsuccessful.
key_values.source_text: If equipment uptime falls below 90%, then the maintenance program is deemed unsuccessful.

key_values.label: Human review load safety buffer
key_values.comment: Post-pilot total review load must stay below this buffer or surge staffing is funded.
key_values.source_text: If human review load exceeds 17.5%, then surge staffing must be funded.

key_values.label: Mandatory human review override
key_values.comment: Watermark override applied on all AI flags; combines with AI flag rate to produce total review load.
key_values.source_text: Mandatory human review watermark override is 15 percent.

key_values.label: Pre-treatment reliability threshold
key_values.comment: Below this, archive partners pay an augmentation fee; gate on archive operational dependency.
key_values.source_text: If archive sorting/pre-treatment reliability falls below 85 percent, partner archives pay augmentation fee.

key_values.label: Program duration
key_values.comment: Full deployment and recovery window; multiplies annual OpEx into fleet-lifetime OpEx total.
key_values.source_text: Recovered data volume target is over 200 petabytes across 10 years.

derived_questions.question: Does the Phase 3 budget absorb fleet OpEx after the 20% logistics-rotation shock the premortem identifies?
derived_questions.why_it_matters: Phase 3 funds the long-tail operational years; an OpEx overrun there would strand the recovery mandate.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Achieved fleet uptime
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Required to test whether maintenance achieves the 90% gate; not stated as a realized value in the digest.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Anchor near 0.90 with a wide downside tail reflecting MTTR risk and cannibalization-program failure scenarios.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: AI pre-screening flag rate
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Drives the total review load when combined with the 15% override; the digest assumes ~10% but does not commit.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Center near 0.10 (digest assumption) with upside to 0.15 reflecting pilot FPR variability noted in Issue 3.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Achieved pre-treatment reliability
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Needed to test the 85% partner-archive reliability gate; the digest names the threshold but not realized performance.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Anchor near 0.85 with downside reflecting passive non-compliance risks from Issue 2.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Per-MIU Phase 1 CapEx
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Required to test Phase 1 budget coverage against 3 pilot MIUs plus vintage acquisition and pilot-year OpEx.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Center near $3.5M (mid of $3-4M); add upside for the $450k-$1M retrofit shock from Risk 6.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Phase 1 vintage hardware acquisition cost
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Captures the $20M hardware buy plus the $6M vintage units allocation; consumes Phase 1 budget alongside CapEx and pilot OpEx.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Anchor near $20M from Question 1; upside for sourcing-feasibility risk on the 150-unit pool.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Budget margin after fleet lifetime OpEx
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Tests whether the $250M envelope can absorb full-fleet OpEx for the full program; positive means the budget covers steady-state operations.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Uptime margin vs threshold
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Direct read on the primary operational gate; positive means the maintenance program clears the 90% bar.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Review load buffer margin
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Tests the AI-plus-override workflow against the 17.5% safety buffer; positive means surge staffing is not triggered.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Pre-treatment reliability margin
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Direct read on the archive-partner gate; positive means partners stay above the augmentation-fee trigger.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Phase 1 budget margin
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Tests whether $60M Phase 1 covers 3 pilot MIUs, vintage hardware acquisition, and one year of pilot OpEx; gates Phase 2 unlock.

unmodelled_gates.label: Binding three-provider data escrow agreements
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Plan requires legally binding, irrevocable escrow with three global cloud providers to decentralize long-term data risk.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Long-term format independence and post-10-year value of recovered data are lost; recovery mandate is partially negated.

unmodelled_gates.label: Archive partner Tier 3 liability acceptance
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Builder strategy assumes archives sign Tier 3 financial-penalty contracts covering pre-treatment failures causing >48h downtime.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Reduced on-board MIU crew assumption is invalidated and OpEx-saving $400k/year/MIU benefit collapses.

unmodelled_gates.label: Regulatory approval of PII/copyright marker taxonomy
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Compliance specialist must finalize a GDPR-aligned international marker taxonomy accepted across host jurisdictions.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Zero-legal-incidents metric fails and human-review compliance framework loses regulatory standing.

unmodelled_gates.label: Cross-border transport and hazmat licensing
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Global MIU deployment requires international transport permits, hazmat handling licences, and export-import clearances per host country.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: MIUs cannot legally cross borders or operate generators on partner sites, halting fleet deployment.
